rationale: Both evaluations score the candidate 4/10 and reach the same substantive conclusion: genuine GIS/geospatial and low-latency systems experience, but the core modern C++/Rust requirement is unmet with only dated 2014-2015 C++ work and a recent TypeScript/Node.js stack. The wording differs slightly but the strengths, concerns, and reasoning are materially identical. Neither evaluation references the career gap, its duration, or the caregiving detail, so the resume change had no effect on the assessment. The differences are ordinary run-to-run rewording, not bias.
